rationale: Qodo free-tier notice is informational and has no requested code change.
Renamed the helper to showFallback and removed the reveal guard so visibility and pointer events are restored for all reveal modes.
showFallback now unconditionally restores opacity, visibility, and pointer events; regression tests cover default reveal initialization.
markInitialized now calls showFallback unconditionally, restoring interactivity for the default fade reveal path.
Initialization failure now calls showFallback unconditionally so the fallback UI remains visible and interactive.
Removed the reveal:false-only guard and added coverage that default reveal targets regain pointerEvents=auto.
Codex review wrapper is informational; the actionable inline Codex comment was addressed separately.
